note.zh: 在 ZCode 中以 GLM-5.2（Max 思考配额）一次生成。原始 HTML 因热栏引用了未定义的 GLASS 常量而无法进入；Codex 仅将该引用修正为已有的 CRYSTAL 方块，未改动玩法或视觉设计。
note.en: Generated in one shot by GLM-5.2 (Max effort) inside ZCode. The original HTML could not enter the game because the hotbar referenced an undefined GLASS constant; Codex only corrected that reference to the existing CRYSTAL block, without changing gameplay or visual design.
